role_justifications.a11y_auditor: Navbar controls and relocated toggle need accessible names and keyboard reachability review.
role_justifications.change_verifier: The task is a scoped UI redesign and needs an independent scope guard.

redesign_exception: AGENTS.md allows redesign when explicitly requested; the user explicitly requested this navbar/background-popover redesign.
acceptance: Workspace User, user@example.com, navbar Glass, and Restore are removed.
Reset appears next to Select and uses the existing reset-to-default layout path.
Glass toggle is reachable inside the background popover and keeps aria-pressed wiring.
Save, Load, Select, add, undo, drag, resize, pin, and save/reload canaries pass in the e2e suite.
